---
title: "Диаграммы состояний приложения"
format: html
---

# Диаграммы состояний приложения

State Diagrams для различных компонентов приложения.

## 1. Состояния экрана (UI State)

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-ui-states
%%| fig-cap: "Переходы состояний UI"
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Loading
    Loading --> Success: Data loaded
    Loading --> Error: Load failed
    Error --> Loading: Retry
    Success --> Loading: Refresh
    Success --> Error: Error occurred
    
    state Success {
        [*] --> Empty
        Empty --> HasData: Data added
        HasData --> Empty: Data cleared
        HasData --> Updating: User action
        Updating --> HasData: Update complete
    }
```

## 2. Навигация приложения

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-navigation
%%| fig-cap: "Навигационные переходы между экранами"
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> PermissionCheck
    
    PermissionCheck --> PermissionScreen: No permission
    PermissionCheck --> Library: Has permission
    PermissionScreen --> Library: Granted
    
    state "Bottom Navigation" as BottomNav {
        Library --> Settings: Navigate
        Settings --> Library: Navigate
    }
    
    Library --> Player: Book clicked
    Library --> Search: Search icon
    Library --> Downloads: Downloads icon
    
    Search --> Player: Local book
    Search --> Topic: Online book
    Topic --> Downloads: Download started
    
    Settings --> Auth: Login
    Auth --> WebView: OAuth flow
    WebView --> Auth: Token received
    
    Player --> Library: Back
    Search --> Library: Back
    Downloads --> Library: Back
    Topic --> Search: Back
    Auth --> Settings: Back
    WebView --> Auth: Back
```

## 3. Состояния загрузки (Download States)

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-download-states
%%| fig-cap: "Жизненный цикл загрузки"
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Queued
    
    Queued --> Downloading: Start download
    Queued --> Cancelled: User cancelled
    
    Downloading --> Paused: User paused
    Downloading --> Completed: Download finished
    Downloading --> Failed: Error occurred
    Downloading --> Cancelled: User cancelled
    
    Paused --> Downloading: Resume
    Paused --> Cancelled: User cancelled
    
    Failed --> Queued: Retry (attempt < 3)
    Failed --> Cancelled: Max retries
    
    Completed --> [*]
    Cancelled --> [*]
    
    state Downloading {
        [*] --> Connecting
        Connecting --> Metadata: Connected
        Metadata --> Transferring: Metadata received
        Transferring --> [*]: Progress 100%
        
        state Transferring {
            [*] --> Downloading_Active
            Downloading_Active --> Downloading_Active: Progress update
        }
    }
```

## 4. Состояния аудио-плеера

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-player-states
%%| fig-cap: "Состояния воспроизведения"
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Idle
    
    Idle --> Loading: Load playlist
    Loading --> Ready: Loaded successfully
    Loading --> Error: Load failed
    
    Ready --> Playing: Play
    Playing --> Paused: Pause
    Playing --> Buffering: Network delay
    Paused --> Playing: Resume
    
    Buffering --> Playing: Buffer ready
    Buffering --> Error: Buffer failed
    
    Playing --> Ended: Track ended
    Ended --> Playing: Next track
    Ended --> Idle: Last track
    
    state Playing {
        [*] --> Normal
        Normal --> Seeking: User seek
        Seeking --> Normal: Seek complete
    }
    
    state "Timer Active" as Timer {
        Playing --> TimerRunning
        TimerRunning --> Paused: Timer expired
    }
    
    Error --> Idle: Reset
    Paused --> Idle: Stop
    Playing --> Idle: Stop
```

## 5. Состояния экрана плеера

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-player-screen
%%| fig-cap: "Состояния экрана плеера"
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> NoBook
    
    NoBook --> LoadingBook: Book selected
    LoadingBook --> PlayerReady: Book loaded
    LoadingBook --> LoadError: Load failed
    
    LoadError --> NoBook: Exit
    LoadError --> LoadingBook: Retry
    
    state PlayerReady {
        [*] --> ShowingPlayer
        ShowingPlayer --> ShowingChapters: Chapters tab
        ShowingChapters --> ShowingPlayer: Player tab
        ShowingPlayer --> ShowingSpeed: Speed control
        ShowingSpeed --> ShowingPlayer: Close
    }
    
    PlayerReady --> NoBook: Exit
```

## 6. Жизненный цикл AudioPlayerService

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-service-lifecycle
%%| fig-cap: "Жизненный цикл AudioPlayerService"
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Created
    
    Created --> Initialized: onCreate()
    Initialized --> Foreground: startForeground()
    
    Foreground --> Playing: play()
    Foreground --> Idle: idle
    
    Playing --> Foreground: pause()
    Playing --> Playing: track change
    
    Idle --> Foreground: activity
    Idle --> Stopping: inactivity timeout (30min)
    
    Foreground --> Stopping: stop()
    Playing --> Stopping: stop()
    
    Stopping --> Destroyed: onDestroy()
    Destroyed --> [*]
    
    state Playing {
        [*] --> PlaybackActive
        PlaybackActive --> SavingPosition: every 5s
        SavingPosition --> PlaybackActive: saved
    }
```

## 7. Состояния авторизации

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-auth-states
%%| fig-cap: "Состояния авторизации"
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> LoggedOut
    
    LoggedOut --> LoggingIn: Login attempt
    LoggingIn --> LoggedIn: Success
    LoggingIn --> LoggedOut: Failed
    
    state LoggedIn {
        [*] --> Active
        Active --> RefreshingToken: Token expired
        RefreshingToken --> Active: Refreshed
        RefreshingToken --> TokenExpired: Refresh failed
    }
    
    TokenExpired --> LoggedOut: Session expired
    LoggedIn --> LoggedOut: Logout
```

## 8. Состояния синхронизации

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-sync-states
%%| fig-cap: "Состояния синхронизации данных"
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Idle
    
    Idle --> Syncing: Periodic trigger / Manual
    Syncing --> Success: Sync complete
    Syncing --> Failed: Sync failed
    
    Success --> Idle: Wait
    Failed --> Idle: Backoff delay
    
    state Syncing {
        [*] --> FetchingRemote
        FetchingRemote --> MergingData: Fetched
        MergingData --> UpdatingLocal: Merged
        UpdatingLocal --> [*]: Updated
    }
```

## 9. Состояния поиска

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-search-states
%%| fig-cap: "Состояния поиска"
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Empty
    
    Empty --> Searching: User types
    Searching --> ShowingResults: Results found
    Searching --> NoResults: No results
    Searching --> Error: Search failed
    
    ShowingResults --> Searching: Query changed
    NoResults --> Searching: Query changed
    Error --> Searching: Query changed
    
    ShowingResults --> Empty: Clear
    NoResults --> Empty: Clear
    
    state ShowingResults {
        [*] --> LocalResults
        LocalResults --> CombinedResults: Online results loaded
        CombinedResults --> LocalResults: Online failed
    }
```

## 10. Состояния WebView

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-webview-states
%%| fig-cap: "Состояния WebView"
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Loading
    
    Loading --> PageLoaded: Load complete
    Loading --> LoadError: Load failed
    
    PageLoaded --> Navigating: Link clicked
    Navigating --> PageLoaded: Navigation complete
    
    PageLoaded --> MagnetDetected: Magnet link
    MagnetDetected --> DownloadStarted: User confirmed
    
    LoadError --> Loading: Retry
    LoadError --> [*]: Back
    PageLoaded --> [*]: Back
```

---

## Описание переходов

### UI State Transitions
- **Loading → Success**: Данные успешно загружены
- **Success → Error**: Произошла ошибка во время работы
- **Error → Loading**: Пользователь нажал Retry

### Download State Transitions
- **Queued → Downloading**: WorkManager начал выполнение
- **Downloading → Paused**: Потеря сети или пользователь приостановил
- **Failed → Queued**: Автоматический retry (max 3 попытки)

### Player State Transitions
- **Ready → Playing**: Пользователь нажал Play
- **Playing → Buffering**: Недостаточно данных в буфере
- **Playing → Ended**: Трек закончился
- **TimerRunning → Paused**: Таймер сна истёк

### Service Lifecycle Transitions
- **Idle → Stopping**: Нет активности 30 минут (InactivityTimer)
- **Playing → SavingPosition**: Автосохранение каждые 5 секунд
- **Foreground → Stopping**: Пользователь явно остановил сервис
